records.m_Talk_ENG: You've got to be kidding...! Where did this many C.O.s come from?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've got to be kidding...! Where did this many C.O.s come from?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've got to be kidding...! Where did this many C.O.s come from?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if it's been locally altered, the essence is the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if it's been locally altered, the essence is the Counterside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if it's been locally altered, the essence is the Counterside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now that the false illusions have lost their power, a portion of the hidden reality has been revealed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now that the false illusions have lost their power, a portion of the hidden reality has been revealed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now that the false illusions have lost their power, a portion of the hidden reality has been revealed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hestia, from now on, operate the ship exactly as I instruct!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hestia, from now on, operate the ship exactly as I instruct!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hestia, from now on, operate the ship exactly as I instruct!

records.m_Talk_ENG: M-me? You're asking me? I've never done anything like this before!
records.m_Talk_DEU: M-me? You're asking me? I've never done anything like this before!
records.m_Talk_FRA: M-me? You're asking me? I've never done anything like this before!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Most of it is handled by Machination G.A.P.'s computational abilities. You just need to press the buttons I tell you to!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Most of it is handled by Machination G.A.P.'s computational abilities. You just need to press the buttons I tell you to!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Most of it is handled by Machination G.A.P.'s computational abilities. You just need to press the buttons I tell you to!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fine! But don't blame me if something goes wrong later, okay?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fine! But don't blame me if something goes wrong later, okay?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fine! But don't blame me if something goes wrong later, okay?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Spacetime Coordinates Margin of Error: 47.82%.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Spacetime Coordinates Margin of Error: 47.82%.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Spacetime Coordinates Margin of Error: 47.82%.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Initiating recalibration to ensure safety.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Initiating recalibration to ensure safety.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Initiating recalibration to ensure safety.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Current remaining power is at 8%.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Current remaining power is at 8%.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Current remaining power is at 8%.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Open the power transmission system! Exclude anything unnecessary and focus everything on the Eternium Drive!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Open the power transmission system! Exclude anything unnecessary and focus everything on the Eternium Drive!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Open the power transmission system! Exclude anything unnecessary and focus everything on the Eternium Drive!

records.m_Talk_ENG: B-but the red light still isn't going off though...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: B-but the red light still isn't going off though...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: B-but the red light still isn't going off though...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let me warn you in advance. With the current power, we've got barely fifteen minutes left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let me warn you in advance. With the current power, we've got barely fifteen minutes left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let me warn you in advance. With the current power, we've got barely fifteen minutes left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we're even a minute late, we'll end up lost in the void of the imaginary space.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we're even a minute late, we'll end up lost in the void of the imaginary space.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we're even a minute late, we'll end up lost in the void of the imaginary space.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is there anyone here who would agree to abandon the other two and escape from here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is there anyone here who would agree to abandon the other two and escape from here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is there anyone here who would agree to abandon the other two and escape from here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please open the hatch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please open the hatch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please open the hatch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll go rescue the two of them.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll go rescue the two of them.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll go rescue the two of them.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you even listen to what I just said?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you even listen to what I just said?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you even listen to what I just said?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're saying we don't have time, so we need to rescue them as quickly as possible, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're saying we don't have time, so we need to rescue them as quickly as possible, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're saying we don't have time, so we need to rescue them as quickly as possible, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. I'll bring them back for sure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. I'll bring them back for sure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. I'll bring them back for sure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bell, you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bell, you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bell, you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: So it's decided.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So it's decided.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So it's decided.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're out of time, so open the hatch already, Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're out of time, so open the hatch already, Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're out of time, so open the hatch already, Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah, I didn't expect anything else from the start.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah, I didn't expect anything else from the start.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah, I didn't expect anything else from the start.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Remember this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Remember this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Remember this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you're even a little late, it's game over for all of us.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you're even a little late, it's game over for all of us.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you're even a little late, it's game over for all of us.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Argh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Argh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Argh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't have time to turn back, but there are too many C.O.s!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't have time to turn back, but there are too many C.O.s!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't have time to turn back, but there are too many C.O.s!

records.m_Talk_ENG: At this rate...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: At this rate...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: At this rate...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Miss Mina.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Miss Mina.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Miss Mina.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For the sake of Miss Ais and Miss Ryu... please lend me your strength.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For the sake of Miss Ais and Miss Ryu... please lend me your strength.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For the sake of Miss Ais and Miss Ryu... please lend me your strength.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do I need to do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do I need to do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do I need to do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you can buy me some time... I'll clear the way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you can buy me some time... I'll clear the way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you can buy me some time... I'll clear the way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what this is about... but fine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what this is about... but fine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what this is about... but fine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll trust you, Bell.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll trust you, Bell.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll trust you, Bell.
